arts.ttl: Real Madrid heavyweight an injury doubt for Leganes fixture
arts.sum: Real Madrid mark their return to action after the international break with a match against Leganes, but they are set to be without an important player for that La Liga clash at the Santiago Bernabeu. Real Madrid currently trail Barcelona by three points in the La Liga title race, and a victory on Saturday would […] The post Real Madrid heavyweight an injury doubt for Leganes fixture appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Managing Madrid Podcast: Should Modric and Vazquez be renewed? MAILBAG!
arts.sum: On this Members-only episode of the Managing Madrid Podcast, Kiyan Sobhani and Lucas Navarrete discuss: Is Fede Valverde in the all-time Real Madrid 25 man squad?

arts.ttl: The best British players to ever play for Real Madrid - ranked
arts.sum: A number of British players have fulfilled childhood dreams of playing for Real Madrid, regarded by many as the biggest club in world football.

arts.ttl: 'Really crazy': Wesley Sneijder once said that Arsenal's new striker target is a mix of Neymar and Kylian Mbappe
arts.sum: Forget Isak and Sesko, Arteta should get him instead!

arts.ttl: EXCLUSIVE: Real Madrid 'tired' of Vinicius Junior 'bluff' over Saudi Pro League transfer
arts.sum: The staggering proposal has led to a stall in negotiations over a new contract with Madrid, with the Brazilian’s current deal set to expire in 2027, and Duncan Castles told The Transfers Podcast that Real are unwilling to match the player's demands to be paid more than Kylian Mbappe . “Madrid have got tired of Vinicius saying ‘I have this huge offer from Saudi Arabia, you're going to have to make me the best paid player in the club’,” Castles said on the latest episode of The Transfers Podcast.
